summary: Cisco laid off 4,000 employees while announcing a strategic shift toward AI networking infrastructure. CEO Chuck Robbins stated the restructuring would free up resources for AI-focused product development and the company's $28 billion Splunk acquisition, which was positioned as a data platform for AI workloads.

secondary_sources.title: Cisco to cut thousands of jobs as it shifts focus to AI

evidence.description: Company confirmed restructuring for AI infrastructure pivot.

ai_technology: AI networking infrastructure, Splunk data platform
